docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED SEP-23-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ALFONSO RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ANDREW RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHARI RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA UNG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MELANIE PAN WITH CAMBODIAN INTERPRETATION. MS. PAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK, R. SAHATJIAN. HEARD WITH CASE #S 20-863574 & 20-863576. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, DEFENDANT ALSO AGREES TO WAIVE HER CLAIMS FOR OWNED RENTS FOR PLAINTIFFS' EARLY TERMINATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, SANDRA
